infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: PROXM needs your location to show nearby users.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: PROXM uses background location in Live mode.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: PROXM needs mic access for the 30-second audio channel.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: PROXM uses your camera for Face Verification.

plugins.cameraPermission: Allow PROXM to access your camera for Face Verify.
